title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says, Modi Government has empowered small traders and start-ups by providing collateral-free loans, thereby giving a new boost to self-employment and small industries
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says, Modi Government has empowered small traders and start-ups by providing collateral-free loans, thereby giving a new boost to self-employment and small industries

Over the past 11 years, more than ₹40 lakh crore worth of 58 crore loans have been disbursed under this welfare scheme
As many as 12 crore youth have benefited and are giving new momentum to the journey of building a self-reliant India
Out of these, the fact that 2 out of every 3 Mudra loans have been given to women is a historic achievement towards women’s empowerment and self-reliance

Posted On:
08 APR 2026 2:17PM by PIB Delhi

On the completion of 11 years the Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana, Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says the government led by Shri Narendra Modi has empowered small traders and start-ups by providing collateral-free loans, thereby giving a new boost to self-employment and small industries.

In a post on ‘X’, Shri Amit Shah said, “In 11 Years Of MUDRA, the government led by Shri Narendra Modi has empowered small traders and startups by providing collateral-free loans, thereby giving new strength to self-employment and small industries. Over the past 11 years, more than ₹40 lakh crore worth of 58 crore loans have been disbursed under this welfare scheme, benefiting 12 crore youth and giving new momentum to the journey of building a self-reliant India. The fact that 2 out of every 3 Mudra loans have been given to women is a historic achievement towards women’s empowerment and self-reliance.”

#11YearsOfMUDRA
 में मोदी सरकार ने छोटे व्यापारियों और स्टार्टअप्स को बिना गारंटी के ऋण उपलब्ध कराकर स्वरोजगार और लघु उद्योग को नई शक्ति दी है।
इन 11 वर्षों में इस कल्याणकारी योजना के तहत ₹40 लाख करोड़ से अधिक के 58 करोड़ लोन वितरित किए जा चुके हैं, जिससे 12 करोड़ युवा लाभान्वित…
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
April 8, 2026

***

RK/RR/PS/SK



(Release ID: 2249984)
